---
title: "script3"
author: "moi"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Objet

Exercice 1 du cours GT R

# Librairies

```{r}
library(sf)
```


# Données


```{r}
st_layers("base.gpkg")
#Attention la complétion (tabulation)
commune <- read.csv()

```

commune et carreau

```{r}
bondy <- st_read("base.gpkg", "commune")
bondy <- bondy [bondy$code == 93010,]
car <- st_read("base.gpkg", "car")
car <- car [car$lcog_geo == 93010,]
```


# Cartograhie


```{r}
png("carte.png")
mf_map(bondy)
mf_map(car, add = T)
mf_layout("Ma première carte", "Mars 2026\nInsee")
dev.off()
```
![](carte.png)
